title: Deterministic phenotype feature extraction completion debt

deliverables.evidence: Public BPET extractor module now exists under the primary crate security/bpet tree.
Root conformance harness exercises deterministic vectors, typed uncertainty, batch extraction, provenance, and drift-sample conversion.
bpet_feature_extraction is registered as a Cargo test target pointing at ../../tests/conformance/bpet_feature_extraction.rs.
JSONL feature samples include full-evidence and missing-evidence scenarios.

checks.detail: capability invocation intensity, resource envelope pressure, network surface, and filesystem surface are extracted from runtime evidence.
declared permission surface and dependency declarations are extracted from manifest metadata.
code complexity and dependency tree depth are extracted from code metadata.
BTreeMap-backed features and sorted batch extraction make repeated extraction deterministic.
Every feature records source, extraction method, feature name, and confidence.
Missing sources, missing fields, and partial evidence are represented with typed uncertainty annotations rather than zero-filled values.
Batch extraction rejects empty, oversized, and duplicate package/version inputs and emits sorted vectors.
Extracted known and partial values can be converted into BPET PhenotypeSample drift-engine input.
bpet_feature_samples.jsonl parses as JSONL and is asserted by the conformance harness.

validation.command: python3 -c 'import json,pathlib; p=pathlib.Path("artifacts/10.21/bpet_feature_samples.jsonl"); [json.loads(line) for line in p.read_text().splitlines() if line.strip()]; print("ok")'

validation.detail: 0 critical findings; cargo-dependent UBS sections intentionally disabled to respect the repository rch/contention rule.

deferred_validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenengine-node --test bpet_feature_extraction
deferred_validation.reason: Deferred because pgrep -af 'cargo|rustc' | wc -l returned 18, above the repo's >2 contention backoff threshold.
